mnemonics: FATE: Fairness, Accountability, Transparency, Ethics - core principles for AI policy
keyPoints: AI systems must be designed to be fair and avoid bias
Humans must remain accountable for AI decisions and outcomes
AI decision-making processes should be transparent and explainable
commonMistakes: Assuming ethical principles are automatically embedded in AI systems
Focusing only on technical performance without considering ethical implications
Treating AI ethics as an afterthought rather than integral to design
